query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.productLane,
  p.priority,
  p.sector,
  p.state,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.stageCode,
  p.estimatedValue,
  p.completionDate,
  p.description,
  p.contractorNames,
  p.ownerName,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier IN ('send_ready','named_verified') AND c.suppressedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS sr_contacts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.suppressedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS total_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressedAt IS NULL
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','tier1')
  AND (p.state IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.state IS NULL OR p.state = 'NATIONAL')
  AND (p.productLane IN ('portable_air','multi_lane_pt') OR p.productLane IS NULL)
  AND p.lifecycleStatus != 'suppressed'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.priority, p.sector, p.state, p.lifecycleStatus, p.stageCode, p.estimatedValue, p.completionDate, p.description, p.contractorNames, p.ownerName
ORDER BY sr_contacts DESC, p.estimatedValue DESC
LIMIT 15;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.suppressedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS total_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressedAt IS NULL
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','tier1')
  AND (p.state IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.state IS NULL OR p.state = 'NATIONAL')

ORDER BY sr_contacts DESC, p.estimatedValue DESC
LIMIT 15;
